queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between having no checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the role of critical credit history or other existing credits as determinants of lower credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of savings account status below 100 DM on reducing credit default likelihood.
